title: Remove images from Cute Accessories section

requirements.text: Remove all product images (AI-generated earring images and any thumbnail switcher gallery) from the Cute Accessories page (CuteAccessoriesPage.tsx). Product cards should display without any image, showing only text-based content such as product name, description, and pricing.
acceptanceCriteria: The Cute Accessories page renders with no images in any product card.
The earring gallery thumbnail switcher component is removed.
No broken image elements or empty image containers remain visible.
All other product information (name, price, tags, add-to-cart) remains intact.
Layout of product cards adjusts cleanly without the image space.

nonGoals: Removing images from any other page or section (bouquets, polaroids, magazines, etc.)
Deleting the generated image files from the static assets folder
